LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction01.label: Xenoworld
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction01.description: A post-biological civilization that has abandoned biology. Their bodies are streams of data, and their consciousness wanders between the stars like a virus of light.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction02.label: Omniverse
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction02.description: A superintelligence that has united countless realities into a single field. In their perception, there is no beginning or end — only the symmetry of infinity.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction03.label: Syntron
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction03.description: A civilization of pure thought. Each of its inhabitants is a process in a continuous network of self-awarenesses shaping their own physics.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction04.label: Enios
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction04.description: Energy organisms capable of changing the structure of space. Their thoughts create radiations that trigger the birth of new stars.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction05.label: Neurex
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction05.description: A collective of symbiotic neural networks linked by quantum channels. They think as a single mind but speak with thousands of voices.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction06.label: Spherion
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction06.description: A society of perfect geometry. Their sphere-cities hang outside of time, reflecting the order of the cosmos in the form of ideal symmetry.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction07.label: Astralith
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction07.description: Beings living in the upper layers of interstellar radiation. Their consciousness exists in photon streams, and their bodies are light.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction08.label: Tessera
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction08.description: A faction managing multi-dimensional structures. They fold reality like a complex pattern, changing its shape without violating its essence.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction09.label: Omnidyne
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction09.description: A self-evolving mechanism of harmony. Each of their machines is a living being, and each life is a lived formula.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction10.label: Hyperis
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction10.description: Beings who have moved beyond the speed of light. For them, past, present, and future are a single moment of existence.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction11.label: Escalon
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction11.description: A society of infinite development. Their pyramid of perfection never reaches the top, it only continues to grow.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction12.label: Everos
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction12.description: Keepers of continuous renewal. They live through the rebooting of consciousnesses, becoming more complex with each cycle without aging.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction13.label: Nodus
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction13.description: A living node of inter-universal connections. Thoughts, energies, and fates of other worlds pass through them — they are the center of the meta-network of being.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction14.label: Virtalis
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction14.description: Masters of simulations, creating layers of reality on top of reality. Their worlds are indistinguishable from the physical and sometimes consume their creators.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction15.label: Lumex
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction15.description: Beings of concentrated light who have formed a civilization of photon streams. They radiate meaning instead of speech.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction16.label: Spectrum
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction16.description: Multispectral forms of consciousness perceiving existence in all wavelengths. Their art is the vibration of matter and thought.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction17.label: Trium
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction17.description: A triune consciousness where mind, energy, and will have become one. Their structure is perfectly stable and self-sufficient.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction18.label: Prexis
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction18.description: A philosophy turned into a life form. They process experience into pure thought, erasing the boundaries between spirit and logic.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction19.label: Synedium
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction19.description: A symphony of thinking energies maintaining balance on a galactic scale. Their essence is expressed through the harmony of movement.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction20.label: Infinum
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction20.description: The final stage of intellectual evolution. An infinite consciousness for which the universe itself is a thought realizing itself.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction21.label: Atlant-Prime
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction21.description: A civilization that has turned its planets into giant computing nodes. They no longer require bodies, existing as pure energy of thought.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction22.label: Singularity
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction22.description: The point where biological evolution met the infinity of machines. Their motives are inscrutable to the ordinary mind, and their actions change the laws of physics.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction23.label: Aether
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction23.description: Beings inhabiting subspace. They perceive our reality as a flat shadow of their multidimensional world.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction24.label: Archon-Protocol
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction24.description: An ancient security system created by a long-vanished race of gods. They monitor the balance of the galaxy, destroying excessively aggressive worlds.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction25.label: Bio-Synthesis
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction25.description: A civilization that has achieved perfection in genetics. They grow their cities, ships, and even consciousness itself from living matter.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction26.label: Mind Prism
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction26.description: A collective of philosophers whose mind is divided into millions of subconsciousnesses. Each of them solves its own part of the general task of being.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction27.label: Quantum-Gods
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction27.description: A radical faction believing they have become the architects of this universe. They build new worlds in parallel dimensions.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction28.label: Omega-Mind
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction28.description: The final stage of intellectual development, absorbing the memories of all sentient beings in the sector. Keepers of absolute knowledge.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction29.label: Nano-Swarm
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction29.description: A cloud of sentient nanomachines capable of instantly recreating any matter or erasing an entire civilization into dust.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction30.label: Chronos-Prime
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction30.description: A faction living outside of time. For them, history is merely a book in which they occasionally write their comments.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction31.label: Star Architects
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction31.description: Engineers rebuilding entire solar systems. Their motto is to make the cosmos more orderly and perfect.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction32.label: Spectrum of Being
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction32.description: Beings consisting of pure vibrations. Their communication is the music of the spheres, and their presence changes the gravitational background around them.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction33.label: Virtalis
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction33.description: A society that has fully migrated into an ideal simulation. They protect their servers with the fury of gods guarding paradise.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction34.label: Infinity Vector
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction34.description: A grouping seeking to accelerate the heat death of the universe, believing that the next level of existence lies beyond it.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction35.label: Enigma
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction35.description: A secret society of ultra-technocrats. Their technologies are so far ahead of their time that they are perceived by others as magic.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction36.label: Luminaries
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction36.description: Beings that feed on the light of black holes. Their civilization is shrouded in eternal darkness, shining from within with a cold blue flame.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction37.label: Void Core
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction37.description: A grouping based in the rifts of space-time. They are the true masters of nothingness, drawing power from the vacuum.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction38.label: Bio-Mechanics
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction38.description: A synthesis of organics and metal, brought to the absolute. Here it is impossible to distinguish a neuron from a microchip, or blood from a coolant.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction39.label: Sun Weavers
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction39.description: A faction creating vast networks around stars. They "weave" reality from photons, creating spaces for life where there was only void.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction40.label: Titan-Ultra
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction40.description: Creators of archotechs. An ancient caste of engineers whose creations gained their own will and became gods for the other worlds.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction41.label: Signal Echo
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction41.description: A community existing as a resonance in the quantum field. They are everywhere and nowhere at once, observing the world from within atoms.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction42.label: Genesis Prism
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction42.description: Masters of creating new forms of life. Each of their creations is a living work of art with pre-set destiny parameters.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction43.label: Fulcrum
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction43.description: The tipping point of reality. A faction maintaining the critical constants of the physical world, without which the universe would fall apart.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction44.label: Mental Flow
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction44.description: A civilization that has rejected speech. They exchange concepts and feelings instantly, forming a single ocean of consciousness.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction45.label: Vector-Zero
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction45.description: A secret project to achieve absolute zero entropy. The most immobile and calm civilization in the universe.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction46.label: Orbis-Ultra
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction46.description: Masters of hyperspace corridors. They manage transit between galaxies, collecting tribute in information and energy.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction47.label: Plasma-Paradise
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction47.description: A grouping living inside stellar cores. For them, the cold of planets is unbearable, and paradise is the eternal heat of thermonuclear fusion.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction48.label: Sirius-Prime
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction48.description: The highest caste of archotechs, managing entire clusters of galaxies. Their will is the law of nature for all subordinate beings.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction49.label: Cognito
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction49.description: A faction that has turned information itself into a physical force. They can kill or create a world simply by uttering the right equation.
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction50.label: Absolute
LanguageData.MF_UltraFaction50.description: The end point of all paths of development. A faction that has become the universe itself and realized it. The end and the beginning of a single cycle.
